message:
test: expand test coverage with a11y, i18n, and regression tests

Accessibility Testing (a11y_snapshots.rs):
- Add snapshot tests for screen reader output simulation
- Test focus order and keyboard navigation paths
- Verify ARIA-equivalent attribute rendering

i18n Testing (i18n_e2e.rs):
- Add RTL layout tests with Hebrew/Arabic text
- Test bidirectional text mixing
- Verify emoji rendering and grapheme cluster handling

Screen Snapshots (screen_snapshots.rs):
- Add comprehensive snapshot coverage for all demo screens
- Test multiple viewport sizes (40x10, 80x24, 120x40, 200x50)
- Add overlay state tests (help, debug)

Regression Tests:
- repro_dirty_span.rs: reproduction case for dirty region calculation bug
- repro_input_bugs.rs: reproduction cases for input parsing edge cases

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
